glosses.ja: お祝い; パーティー

sentences.target: Die Feier ist heute im Garten.

translations.de: Die Feier ist heute im Garten.
translations.en: The party is today in the garden.
translations.es: La fiesta es hoy en el jardín.
translations.fr: La fête a lieu aujourd’hui dans le jardin.
translations.it: La festa è oggi in giardino.
translations.pt: A festa é hoje no jardim.
translations.vi: Bữa tiệc hôm nay ở vườn.
translations.nl: Het feest is vandaag in de tuin.
translations.hu: A buli ma a kertben lesz.
translations.el: Το πάρτι είναι σήμερα στον κήπο.
translations.nb: Festen er i dag i hagen.
translations.da: Festen er i dag i haven.
translations.ja: 今日、庭でパーティーがある。

tokens.explanation: Definite article marking the feminine noun 'Feier'; nominative singular (subject).
Common noun (feminine); acts as the subject of the clause.
Auxiliary verb used as a copula; 3rd person singular present linking subject to the predicate.
Temporal adverb indicating time.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'); introduces a locative prepositional phrase and governs dative.
Common noun (masculine); object of the preposition 'im' in dative singular (location).

sentences.target: Ich bringe Kuchen für die Feier mit.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbʁɪŋə ˈkuːxən fyːɐ̯ diː ˈfaɪ̯ɐ mɪt/

translations.de: Ich bringe Kuchen für die Feier mit.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbʁɪŋə ˈkuːxən fyːɐ̯ diː ˈfaɪ̯ɐ mɪt/
translations.en: I’m bringing cake for the party.
translations.fr: J’apporte un gâteau pour la fête.
translations.it: Porto una torta per la festa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我会带蛋糕去参加聚会。
translations.pt: Vou levar bolo para a festa.
translations.vi: Tôi mang bánh đến bữa tiệc.
translations.nl: Ik neem taart mee naar het feest.
translations.hi: मैं पार्टी के लिए केक लेकर आ रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg tar med kake til festen.
translations.id: Saya akan membawa kue untuk pesta.
translations.sv: Jag tar med tårta till festen.
translations.da: Jeg tager kage med til festen.
translations.ja: パーティーにケーキを持っていきます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular subject.
Main verb; 1st person singular present. Finite part of the separable verb 'mitbringen' (particle appears later).
Common noun; direct object (accusative, mass/singular or plural without article).
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a PP expressing purpose/beneficiary.
Definite article marking 'Feier'; accusative singular feminine (object of 'für').
Common noun (feminine); object of the preposition 'für' in accusative.
Separable verbal particle completing the verb 'mitbringen'; appears in clause-final position.

sentences.target: Wir planen die Feier im kleinen Café.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈplaːnən diː ˈfaɪ̯ɐ ʔɪm ˈklaɪ̯nən kaˈfeː/

translations.de: Wir planen die Feier im kleinen Café.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈplaːnən diː ˈfaɪ̯ɐ ʔɪm ˈklaɪ̯nən kaˈfeː/
translations.en: We’re planning the party in the small café.
translations.es: Estamos organizando la fiesta en la cafetería pequeña.
translations.fr: On organise la fête dans le petit café.
translations.it: Stiamo organizzando la festa nel piccolo bar.
translations.ko: 작은 카페에서 파티 계획을 세우고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在小咖啡馆里筹划这场聚会。
translations.yue: 我哋喺細咖啡店度籌備個派對。
translations.ru: Мы планируем вечеринку в небольшом кафе.
translations.pt: Estamos planejando a festa na cafeteria pequena.
translations.he: אנחנו מתכננים את המסיבה בבית קפה קטן.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang lên kế hoạch cho bữa tiệc ở quán cà phê nhỏ.
translations.ar: نحن نخطط للحفلة في مقهى صغير.
translations.nl: We plannen het feest in het kleine café.
translations.uk: Ми плануємо вечірку в маленькій кав’ярні.
translations.hu: A kis kávézóban tervezzük a bulit.
translations.hi: हम छोटे कैफ़े में पार्टी की योजना बना रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σχεδιάζουμε το πάρτι στη μικρή καφετέρια.
translations.nb: Vi planlegger festen på den lille kaféen.
translations.id: Kami merencanakan pesta di kafe kecil.
translations.sv: Vi planerar festen på det lilla kaféet.
translations.da: Vi planlægger festen på den lille café.
translations.ja: 小さなカフェでパーティーの計画を立てています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural subject.
Main verb; 1st person plural present.
Definite article marking 'Feier'; accusative singular feminine (direct object).
Common noun (feminine); direct object of 'planen'.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'); introduces a dative PP (location).
Attributive adjective; dative singular masculine agreeing with 'Café'.
Common noun; object of 'im' in dative singular; the PP likely specifies the location related to the celebration/planning.

sentences.target: Morgen gehen wir zur Feier im Verein.
sentences.reading: /ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ˈɡeːən viːɐ̯ tsuːʁ ˈfaɪ̯ɐ ʔɪm fɛʁˈaɪ̯n/

translations.de: Morgen gehen wir zur Feier im Verein.
translations.ipa: /ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ˈɡeːən viːɐ̯ tsuːʁ ˈfaɪ̯ɐ ʔɪm fɛʁˈaɪ̯n/
translations.en: Tomorrow we’re going to the party at the club.
translations.es: Mañana vamos a la fiesta en el club.
translations.fr: Demain, on va à la fête au club.
translations.it: Domani andiamo alla festa al circolo.
translations.zh-Hans: 明天我们要去协会的聚会。
translations.yue: 聽日我哋會去社團嘅派對。
translations.ru: Завтра мы идём на вечеринку в клубе.
translations.pt: Amanhã vamos à festa no clube.
translations.vi: Ngày mai chúng tôi sẽ đi dự tiệc ở câu lạc bộ.
translations.ar: غدًا سنذهب إلى الحفلة في النادي.
translations.nl: Morgen gaan we naar het feest bij de vereniging.
translations.uk: Завтра ми йдемо на вечірку в клубі.
translations.hu: Holnap megyünk a klubban tartott buliba.
translations.hi: कल हम क्लब में होने वाली पार्टी में जा रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Jutro idziemy na imprezę w klubie.
translations.el: Αύριο πάμε στο πάρτι στο σύλλογο.
translations.nb: I morgen skal vi på festen i klubben.
translations.id: Besok kami pergi ke pesta di klub.
translations.sv: I morgon går vi på festen i klubben.
translations.ro: Mâine mergem la petrecerea de la club.
translations.cs: Zítra jdeme na oslavu v klubu.
translations.da: I morgen skal vi til festen i klubben.
translations.ja: 明日、クラブのパーティーに行きます。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb indicating time.
Main verb; 1st person plural present.
Personal pronoun; 1st person plural subject.
Preposition (contraction of 'zu der'); governs dative and introduces a goal/direction PP.
Common noun (feminine); object of 'zur' in dative singular.
Preposition (contraction of 'in dem'); introduces a dative PP modifying 'Feier' (location).
Common noun (masculine); object of 'im' in dative singular.
